title: GZIP File Extractor
description: Extract files from GZIP archives online instantly and securely.

faq.question: How do I extract a GZ file?
faq.answer: Upload your GZIP file to Converigo, and the contents will be extracted and ready for download immediately.

faq.question: Is the extraction secure?
faq.answer: Yes, files are processed securely on our servers and automatically deleted after extraction.

faq.question: What file sizes are supported?
faq.answer: GZIP files up to 500MB can be extracted instantly on Converigo.

faq.question: What is GZIP compression?
faq.answer: GZIP is a compression algorithm that reduces file size while preserving the original data exactly.

faq.question: Can I extract TAR.GZ files?
faq.answer: Yes, TAR.GZ files (compressed TAR archives) are fully supported for extraction.

faq.question: Are multiple files supported?
faq.answer: GZIP typically contains one file. For multiple files, use TAR.GZ or other multi-file formats.

faq.question: What if extraction fails?
faq.answer: Ensure the GZIP file is not corrupted and try re-uploading if extraction fails.

faq.question: Can I extract GZ files on mobile?
faq.answer: Yes, Converigo works on all modern browsers and devices.

about_formats.title: What is a GZIP file?
about_formats.text: GZIP is a compression format used to reduce file size. It's widely used on the web for file distribution and data transfer.

about_formats.title: Why extract a GZIP file?
about_formats.text: Extracting GZIP files recovers the original content and allows you to work with the uncompressed data.

about_formats.title: GZIP compression ratio
about_formats.text: GZIP typically reduces file size by 60-80%, making it ideal for data distribution and backups.

cta.title: Extract GZIP files in seconds
cta.text: Upload your GZIP archive and get your file instantly.
